channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Clip this: Netflix's new mobile design is all about short videos and scrolling
item.description: Kick back this weekend with Netflix's fresh (and much-needed) mobile app redesign that brings "Clips" into our lives.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Netflix introduces "Clips," a personalized feed that offers vertical videos of content on the platform to share or save for later.
media:content.media:text: Netflix introduces "Clips," a personalized feed that offers vertical videos of content on the platform to share or save for later.
media:content.media:title: Netflix introduces "Clips," a personalized feed that offers vertical videos of content on the platform to share or save for later.

item.title: You no longer have to pay for Gemini’s smartest organization tool
item.description: Google just unlocked Gemini’s Notebooks for everyone on mobile, letting you organize research projects for free.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Google Gemini app
media:content.media:text: The Google Gemini app
media:content.media:title: The Google Gemini app

item.title: Google flips the script, reportedly considers putting ads in Gemini app
item.description: Amid Alphabet's earnings call, a Google executive stated that ads could be headed to the Gemini app after all.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Ask Gemini prompt on Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Ask Gemini prompt on Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Ask Gemini prompt on Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: Oura sees a gap in women's health, rolls out birth control support and more
item.description: Oura is stepping up its women's health game, announcing the arrival of birth control support and Menopause Insights in an upcoming May patch.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic
media:content.media:text: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic
media:content.media:title: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic

item.title: Samsung helped me save $30 on my phone bill with this fantastic AND free feature
item.description: Phone bills can be stupid expensive, but a hidden option on Samsung Galaxy phones running One UI 8.5 or later can make your bill cheaper.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Enabling Direct voicemail on a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Enabling Direct voicemail on a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Enabling Direct voicemail on a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: The 'best-sounding earbuds I've used yet' just scored a rare discount at Amazon — but you better act fast
item.description: The Bose Quietcomfort Ultra (Gen 2) are among the best-sounding and most comfortable wireless earbuds we've ever used, and now they're 17% off at Amazon.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds Gen 2 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds Gen 2 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds Gen 2 review on Android Central

item.title: Motorola Razr 2027: What we want to see
item.description: The 2026 Razr series is largely underwhelming, so let's take a look at what Motorola needs to do differently in 2027.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, Razr Plus 2026, and Razr 2026

item.title: Google Home's camera feed, media controls get upgraded in all the right ways
item.description: Major refinements make a world of difference for Google Home's cameras and Gemini for Home early access.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Viewing favorite devices in the Google Home app in 2024
media:content.media:text: Viewing favorite devices in the Google Home app in 2024
media:content.media:title: Viewing favorite devices in the Google Home app in 2024

item.title: Major reports say OnePlus, Realme merge, but there's a lot still in the dark
item.description: A crucial report claimed that OnePlus has merged with another OPPO sub-brand, Realme; however, there's much that's still in the dark.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display
media:content.media:text: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display
media:content.media:title: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display

item.title: A new Verizon deal apparently just gives you $100 to try the Samsung Galaxy S26 — here's how it works
item.description: Just in time for Mother's Day, Verizon wants to give you a free Samsung Galaxy S26 and a $100 gift card, just for kicks.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus violet
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus violet
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus violet

item.title: The future of Samsung's Galaxy Books might look more like Android
item.description: Samsung was reported to chase a new Galaxy Book venture, which would see future laptops based on Android, not ChromeOS.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Book2 Pro 360 (2022) review image

media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Book2 Pro 360 (2022) review image

item.title: Galaxy S27 Ultra could get a camera shake-up that drops the lesser telephoto
item.description: Losing something? Early rumors say the Galaxy S27 Ultra's camera could shake things up.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central

item.title: My friends and I became the Ninja Turtles, and my Friday nights will never be the same again
item.description: I've been blown away playing Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City for the Meta Quest, and you absolutely have to check it out for yourself.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Me hanging out with the Ninja Turtles wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset
media:content.media:text: Me hanging out with the Ninja Turtles wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset

item.title: Google AI is creeping into every app on your phone. Here is how to disable it
item.description: Learn how to remove Gemini AI-powered features across apps like Gmail, Phone, Messages, and more from your phone.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Gemini response on iPhone 16 Pro Max
media:content.media:text: Google Gemini response on iPhone 16 Pro Max
media:content.media:title: Google Gemini response on iPhone 16 Pro Max

item.title: I never thought I'd see a $199 phone ever again, yet the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro is better than phones twice its price
item.description: NXTPAPER phones have long been about great displays, but TCL's latest phone also drops the price in a year when everything's getting more expensive.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The homescreen of the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro with one of the default painting wallpapers, next to a rose plant
media:content.media:text: The homescreen of the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro with one of the default painting wallpapers, next to a rose plant
media:content.media:title: The homescreen of the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro with one of the default painting wallpapers, next to a rose plant

item.title: Google is upgrading in-car Assistant to Gemini, and it’s more than just a refresh
item.description: Google is replacing Assistant in cars with Gemini, bringing natural voice control, smarter navigation, and deeper car integration.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Gemini on a car dashboard
media:content.media:text: Gemini on a car dashboard

item.title: The Galaxy A37 is Samsung's latest midrange masterpiece — and it's already FREE with new T-Mobile deal
item.description: Need a budget phone with flagship-level specs? T-Mobile will give you the Galaxy A37 for FREE when you add a line.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

item.title: Google's Tensor G6 rumors nearly had me hyped, but it might let me down
item.description: What the Tensor G6 from Google could offer this year gets discussed, and these rumors might not excite.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: More 'Pixel Glow' rumors light up Google's plans, teases its AI's involvement
item.description: Rumors pounce on new, alleged "Pixel Glow" evidence, suggesting Google plans a sizable LED assortment and Gemini's role in the feature.

item.title: This pocket-friendly e-reader has transformed how I read books
item.description: DuRoBo Krono looks like a phone, but this device comes with an E Ink panel instead, making it a portable e-reader like no other.

item.title: Samsung's Q1 2026 earnings are insane, and your Galaxy phone barely helped
item.description: Samsung is raking in cash from booming AI chips, but its phone business is slowing down.

item.title: Meta's Q1 2026 earnings are in, and it looks like Zuckerberg's blank check for AI spending is raising some eyebrows
item.description: Meta is all about AI these days, and the company's Q1 2026 earnings call showed that this is costing a lot of money.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: Qualcomm FY Q2 2026 earnings highlight a mobile industry under pressure from the memory shortage
item.description: Qualcomm's FY Q2 earnings report shows $10.6 billion in revenue, driven by Automotive and IoT, while headset sales struggle amid the ongoing RAM crisis.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Qualcomm logo
media:content.media:text: Qualcomm logo
media:content.media:title: Qualcomm logo

item.title: You don't have to worry about which Motorola Razr Plus 2026 color to buy, because there's only the one option
item.description: The Motorola Razr Plus 2026 is the mid-range flagship of the Razr 2026 foldable lineup. You won't believe how many colors it comes in…
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)

item.title: Which Motorola Razr 2026 color should you buy?
item.description: The Motorola Razr 2026 is available in a squad of colorways, each with a unique finish. Some colorways are old, while others are new. Say "Hello Moto" to them!

item.title: Motorola's $1,499 Razr Ultra 2026 is the perfect example of why we don't need new phones every year

item.title: I went hands-on with the Motorola Razr 2026 series and I have some very mixed feelings, but there's one model that definitely stands out
item.description: Motorola's new Razr 2026 series offers some refinements compared to the Razr 2025 devices, but the lack of changes may not be enough when prices are going up.

item.title: Hello, iconic: the Moto Razr 2026 series rocks the same great look, but levels up to bold new heights
